mapper.select: select * from ygt_group_order_item where ygt_goi_order_id = #{orderId} order by ygt_group_order_item_id asc

select i.ygt_goi_campaign_goods_id as campaignGoodsId, i.ygt_goi_nx_community_goods_id as nxCommunityGoodsId, i.ygt_goi_goods_name_snapshot as goodsName, i.ygt_goi_spec_snapshot as specSnapshot, coalesce(i.ygt_goi_unit_snapshot, i.ygt_goi_unit) as unit, sum(i.ygt_goi_quantity) as totalQuantity, count(distinct i.ygt_goi_order_id) as orderCount, count(distinct coalesce(o.ygt_go_external_user_id, o.ygt_go_member_identifier, o.ygt_go_from_user)) as confirmedCustomerCount, sum(i.ygt_goi_amount) as totalAmount from ygt_group_order_item i inner join ygt_group_order o on o.ygt_group_order_id = i.ygt_goi_order_id where o.ygt_go_campaign_id = #{campaignId} and o.ygt_go_status = 'CONFIRMED' group by i.ygt_goi_campaign_goods_id, i.ygt_goi_nx_community_goods_id, i.ygt_goi_goods_name_snapshot, i.ygt_goi_spec_snapshot, coalesce(i.ygt_goi_unit_snapshot, i.ygt_goi_unit) order by i.ygt_goi_goods_name_snapshot asc
mapper.insert: insert into ygt_group_order_item (ygt_goi_order_id, ygt_goi_campaign_id, ygt_goi_candidate_item_id, ygt_goi_campaign_goods_id, ygt_goi_nx_community_goods_id, ygt_goi_goods_name_snapshot, ygt_goi_spec_snapshot, ygt_goi_quantity, ygt_goi_unit, ygt_goi_unit_snapshot, ygt_goi_price_snapshot, ygt_goi_amount, ygt_goi_remark, ygt_goi_create_time) values (#{ygtGoiOrderId}, #{ygtGoiCampaignId}, #{ygtGoiCandidateItemId}, #{ygtGoiCampaignGoodsId}, #{ygtGoiNxCommunityGoodsId}, #{ygtGoiGoodsNameSnapshot}, #{ygtGoiSpecSnapshot}, #{ygtGoiQuantity}, #{ygtGoiUnit}, #{ygtGoiUnitSnapshot}, #{ygtGoiPriceSnapshot}, #{ygtGoiAmount}, #{ygtGoiRemark}, #{ygtGoiCreateTime})
mapper.update: update ygt_group_order_item set ygt_goi_remark = #{ygtGoiRemark} where ygt_group_order_item_id = #{ygtGroupOrderItemId}
mapper.delete: delete from ygt_group_order_item where ygt_group_order_item_id in #{id}
